features: Avoids colour run accidents – Colour Catcher laundry sheets effectively trap colours that bleed into the water during the wash. The proof is on the sheet!
Colour protection - These colour protection sheets protect your clothes against dye transfer accidents, even caused by micro-bleeding.
Keeps colours bright – The Colour Catcher laundry sheets preserve colour vibrancy wash after wash thanks to 100% colour protect technology.
Great results for all laundry – Colour Catcher laundry sheet provides great results for all your laundry, no matter the wash cycle, fabric or temperature.
Up to 20% savings – With Colour Catcher sheets you can help your wallet and your laundry routine by saving energy, water and time.
description: Product Description "Colour Catcher Colour Protection Sheets Your insurance for perfect laundry & colours! Colour Catcher laundry sheets protect your clothes from colour run accidents, even caused by micro-bleeding thanks to 100% colour protect technology. It preserves colour vibrancy and provides great results for all your laundry, no matter the wash cycle, fabric or temperature. Additionally, you can help your wallet, simplify your laundry routine by saving up to 20% energy, water and time*. No Colour Catcher = no wash! And this is how the magic happens: - During the wash, colours bleed into the water. - The sheet catches and traps them safely so they don't transfer on the other clothes. - The proof is on the sheet!™ Each sheet is made of 100% naturally-derived & bio-degradable fibres and the packaging is FSC certified, made of 100% recycled paper and fully recyclable. Product Details: - Avoids colour run accidents - Keeps colours bright - Saves up to 20% energy, water & time* - All cycles, fabrics & temperatures - Colour Catcher is the No1 Laundry Sheet Brand in the UK** - The sheet is made of 100% naturally-derived & bio-degradable fibres - Packaging is FSC certified and made of 100% recycled paper and fully recyclable *Simulation by Prof. Stamminger, University of Bonn **Henkel is market leader in laundry sheets, value sales. Source: Kantar, GB Market, Laundry Colour Sheets, Value Share %, 52 w/e 07th July 2024" Ingredients perfume Manufacturer Contact Information Henkel Ltd., Wood Lane End, Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, HP2 4RQ, United Kingdom. Henkel Ireland Distribution Ltd., Tallaght Business Park, Whitestown, Dublin 24, D24 YH42, Ireland. See more
